sourceOrigin: generated from the tracked Beastbound G13 starter-cub identity lock
faintSemanticRule: reversible faint only; spiral, unfocused, or pose-appropriate closed eyes allowed; literal X/cross/death eyes forbidden

temporalStaticReview.down: both views descend to a reversible prone hold; audited front down-6 cross eyes were replaced with authored adjacent-frame spiral cues
temporalStaticReview.revive: both views begin at exact down-8 and rise without returning to a lower pose after standing
temporalStaticReview.runtimeStatusOverlay: stun halo is a separate runtime battle-status layer and is intentionally absent from these frames
temporalStaticReview.dodge: front and back views use explicit evade arcs and return to the authored anchor
temporalStaticReview.backSkill: coil/charge, airborne forward release, and anchor recovery are readable
temporalStaticReview.backKnockaway: impact produces a 26px airborne lift with authored tumble/roll poses
